name: CottageVille
short_description: CottageVille is a cozy idling game, where you can design your very own cottage and do various activities (such as planning, listening to music, etc.) on your own, and together with your friends!
detailed_description:
Find your ideal balance of relaxation and productivity in a cozy space that's entirely yours. Personalize every detail - from furniture and decor to weather and time of day - to create an atmosphere that supports your goals and suits your current vibe.

Key Features

  • Cottage Customization - Transform your space by customizing and toggling the appearance of furniture, decorations, and items to match your style.

  • Dynamic Atmosphere - Set the perfect mood by controlling weather patterns and time of day whenever you like.

  • Activity Status - Let friends know what you're up to by sharing your current activities and vibes.

  • Personal Whiteboard - Jot down notes, reminders, and thoughts in your own cozy corner of the cottage.

  • Curated Audio Player - Relax to epic lo-fi beats from talented artists while you unwind.

  • Interactive Discoveries - Unlock hidden mini-games and surprises by exploring the various objects scattered throughout your cottage.

  • Shared Coziness - Invite friends into your space and create warm memories together.
